task.label: Notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority

conditions.condition: in the case of a personal data breach
without undue delay and, where feasible, not later than 72 hours after having become aware of it

exception.description: unless the personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

task.label: Accompany notification with reasons for the delay

conditions.condition: where the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours

task.label: Notify the controller of a personal data breach

conditions.condition: after becoming aware of a personal data breach

task.label: Describe the nature of the personal data breach in the notification
Communicate the name and contact details of the data protection officer
Describe the likely consequences of the personal data breach
Describe the measures taken or proposed to address the breach

conditions.condition: where it is not possible to provide the information at the same time

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: when the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

exception.description: the controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures applied to the affected personal data, such as encryption
the controller has taken subsequent measures which ensure that the high risk is no longer likely to materialise
direct communication would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: Describe the nature of the breach in clear and plain language in the communication

conditions.condition: when communicating the personal data breach to the data subject

task.label: Include information and measures referred to in Article 33(3)(b), (c) and (d) in the communication

conditions.condition: when communicating the personal data breach to the data subject

task.label: Make a public communication to inform data subjects in an equally effective manner

conditions.condition: where direct communication to the data subject would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: Require the controller to communicate the breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: if the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
having considered the likelihood of the breach resulting in a high risk

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject upon requirement

conditions.condition: if required by the supervisory authority

task.label: Decide that conditions for exemption from communication are met

conditions.condition: if the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
having considered the likelihood of the breach resulting in a high risk
